import { createOperatorSubscriber } from './OperatorSubscriber'; export function scanInternals(accumulator, seed, hasSeed, emitOnNext, emitBeforeComplete) { return (source, subscriber) => { let hasState = hasSeed; let state = seed; let index = 0; source.subscribe(createOperatorSubscriber(subscriber, (value) => { const i = index++; state = hasState ? accumulator(state, value, i) : ((hasState = true), value); emitOnNext && subscriber.next(state); }, emitBeforeComplete && (() => { hasState && subscriber.next(state); subscriber.complete(); }))); }; } //# sourceMappingURL=scanInternals.js.map
